variants.description: Drives zero output and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
Starts from zero instead of the required fixed 0.239 offset.
Uses a denominator of 32 instead of the specified 32*10/9 scaling.
Swaps the din3 MSB and din0 LSB code weights.
DAC Ideal 4b Offset: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
